name: Cauliflower Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water, milk and salt to a boil in a large saucepan. Add cauliflower and simmer for 4 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain; rinse the cauliflower under cold running water to stop cooking.
2. Coat a jelly-roll pan with non-stick cooking spray. Arrange the cauliflower in a single layer on the pan. Combine oil, lemon juice, capers, anchovy paste, and mustard in a blender. Whirl until smooth. Drizzle evenly over the cauliflower. Sprinkle bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese on top.
3. Bake on the upper shelf of a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes or until crisped and heated through. Serve hot or warm.
